email_subject: Application for Sales Contract Assistant (20-24h/week) - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Sales Contract Assistant position at Actief Interim Leuven, as advertised. With a strong background in digital marketing, web management, and administrative coordination, I am confident in my ability to support vendor onboarding processes and manage customer portals with accuracy and efficiency.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, content management, and website maintenance for multiple clients. This requires meticulous attention to detail, proactive problem-solving, and effective communication with stakeholders—skills directly transferable to the responsibilities outlined in this role. I am IT-savvy, proficient in various software tools, and fluent in English.

I am available to start as soon as possible and can work the required 20-24 hours per week. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to your dynamic team.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Sales Contract Assistant position at Actief Interim Leuven. With a blend of technical proficiency, organizational skills, and a proactive mindset, I am well-prepared to support vendor onboarding, manage customer portals, and coordinate complex questionnaires.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress websites. This role demands accuracy, attention to detail, and the ability to troubleshoot issues independently—qualities essential for the Sales Contract Assistant position. I am comfortable working with various software tools and am fluent in English, ensuring clear communication with stakeholders.

My experience extends to my personal project, mirook.com, where I implemented structured data and conducted technical audits to improve search visibility. This project honed my ability to follow guidelines meticulously and resolve challenges creatively.

I am drawn to this role because it offers the opportunity to apply my administrative and coordination skills in an international, inclusive environment. I am available to start immediately and can work the required part-time schedule. I am eager to bring my detail-oriented approach and solution-oriented attitude to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can contribute to Actief Interim Leuven.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Proven ability to manage administrative processes with accuracy and attention to detail, as demonstrated in my current role handling on-page SEO and website maintenance for multiple clients.
IT-savvy with proficiency in various software tools including WordPress, Elementor, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs.
Strong organizational and proactive problem-solving skills, developed through troubleshooting technical SEO issues and coordinating content updates.
Fluent in English (spoken and written) with effective communication skills for internal stakeholder coordination.
Experience working independently and managing multiple tasks in a remote, fast-paced environment.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and administrative coordination. At Episto, I manage on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites, demonstrating strong organizational skills and attention to detail. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data and technical audits, further honing my ability to follow guidelines and troubleshoot challenges. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Administrative & coordination: vendor onboarding support, customer portal registration, questionnaire coordination, internal communication
- IT-savvy: proficient in various software tools, including WordPress, Elementor, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Search Console, Google Ads
- SEO & content: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, content writing, website content management
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Other: accurate, proactive, strong organizational skills, solutions-oriented

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
